tree.name: Nikola Topic
tree.tradeDescription: Drafted 12th overall by OKC using Houston's pick, acquired in Russell Westbrook trade (Jul 16, 2019)
tree.note: Serbian PG prospect. Pick chain: HOU owned → OKC (Westbrook trade)

assetsGivenUp.name: Russell Westbrook
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 4th overall by Seattle with their own lottery pick. Traded to Houston (Jul 16, 2019) for Chris Paul, 2024 1st (Topić), 2026 1st, and pick swaps.
